title: Final submission: GLU + GQA model (2.738 loss)
author: Sarthakm811
body:
## Submission: Tiny GPT (Parameter Golf)

### Model Summary

* Architecture: Tiny GPT with GLU MLP + Grouped Query Attention (H=2, KV=1)
* Parameter count: 1536

### Training Setup

* Dataset: Shakespeare (character-level)
* Sequence length: 32
* Optimizer: AdamW
* Learning rate: 0.002 with cosine decay + warmup
* EMA: 0.999
* Training steps: 10000

### Results

* Best validation loss: 2.7382
* Final validation loss: 2.7570
* Perplexity: 15.75

### Key Improvements

* GLU-based MLP for better feature interaction
* GQA (H=2, KV=1) for efficient attention
* Extended training for convergence

### Notes

* Model stays within parameter budget
* Significant improvement over baseline (~2.83 loss)
